category_sources: source_facts.description says GNMI CLI client and collector; official docs describe gNMI RPC and collector capabilities.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and homepage use the stylized display name gNMIc.
docs_sources: Official gnmic.openconfig.net documentation site covers features, installation, commands, and user guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/openconfig/gnmic, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe gNMI CLI, collector deployment, telemetry, OpenConfig, and network data operations.
